meta.title: You are Not Special
meta.description:
This episode of Unsolicited Response took aim at the “we’re different” excuse that’s alive and well in OT.

Medical, automotive, data centers, voting systems, they all said they were special too. Turns out, they just delayed fixing the same hardware problems everyone else had to face.

OT isn't immune. The longer you resist secure hardware practices, the harder the landing.
